visits.notes: Pain rated 7/10, radiating to left leg. MRI shows L4-L5 disc bulge. Referred to physiotherapy.
PHQ-9 score 14 (moderate depression). Reports low energy, loss of interest, poor appetite. Duloxetine continued, added benefit for neuropathic pain component.
Bilateral knee crepitus, swelling in right knee. X-ray confirms moderate osteoarthritis. Advised weight management and low-impact exercise. Physiotherapy extended.
PHQ-9 score 9 (mild depression), improved. Back pain 4/10. Patient reports fatigue and occasional dizziness possibly related to Naproxen. Gastric symptoms noted, Pantoprazole added.
